creator: @quebert
executive_summary: For moderate risk, the portfolio stays growth-aware but risk-controlled: 70% stocks, 25% materials, 5% cash. The focus is on oversold high-quality names with valuation support, supplemented by defensive materials as macro hedge.

macro_environment.summary: Market in mixed regime with extreme technical oversold conditions creating dip-buying opportunity. Fear & Greed index at 38 (Fear) despite benign VIX=17.2 suggests capitulation-driven selloff. Broad index oversold while individual high-quality names trade at depressed RSI levels.
key_factors: Fear & Greed at 38 with VIX near 17 indicates stress without panic-volatility spike
Multiple candidates RSI<30 (PYPL, NFLX, SOFI, META) support mean-reversion setups
Positive yield curve still supports large-cap financial earnings quality
USD weakness theme supports materials allocation as portfolio ballast

cross_sector_insights.insight: Technical oversold pressure spans growth and value simultaneously
cross_sector_insights.implication: This supports phased re-risking in quality names rather than broad index chasing

cross_sector_insights.insight: Fear sentiment is elevated while realized volatility remains moderate
cross_sector_insights.implication: Contrarian entries have favorable asymmetry if stops are respected

cross_sector_insights.insight: Financials and payments show better valuation support than mega-cap growth
cross_sector_insights.implication: Moderate profile can overweight banks/payments and keep selective growth exposure

risk_adjusted_picks.name: PayPal Holdings
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI 23.4 with PEG under 1.0 offers strong mean-reversion setup with valuation support.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Payment platform with depressed valuation versus normalized growth and improving operating discipline.
thesis_invalidators: Further margin compression in core checkout business
Material negative guidance revision in next earnings

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Meta Platforms
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI near 28 and PEG below 1.0 create rare value-for-growth entry in mega-cap tech.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: AI monetization plus resilient ad engine should re-rate valuation after technical reset.
thesis_invalidators: Regulatory action that impairs core ad monetization

risk_adjusted_picks.name: SoFi Technologies
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: High-growth fintech with oversold RSI and upcoming catalyst, sized smaller for volatility.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Bank-charter economics and member growth support upside if next earnings confirm momentum.
thesis_invalidators: Weak guidance that invalidates growth trajectory

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Netflix
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Extremely oversold RSI with very strong free-cash-flow profile supports rebound thesis.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Cash-generative streaming leader is priced for overly bearish near-term expectations.
thesis_invalidators: Subscriber growth miss across key regions

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Bank of America
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Uptrend plus near-oversold RSI and low PEG gives attractive risk-adjusted financial exposure.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Large-cap bank earnings resilience should benefit from stable rates and healthier credit backdrop.
thesis_invalidators: Yield-curve inversion compresses net interest margin

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Citigroup
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI near oversold with low PEG and positive analyst skew supports recovery potential.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Execution on wealth/prime-brokerage plan can unlock valuation catch-up versus peers.
thesis_invalidators: Macro shock that hits investment banking flows

risk_adjusted_picks.name: JPMorgan Chase
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Quality balance sheet and earnings consistency with RSI reset make it core moderate holding.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Franchise strength across consumer and capital-markets businesses supports steady compounding.
thesis_invalidators: Material slowdown in fee and advisory revenues

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Gilead Sciences
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Lowest PEG in the screened universe with defensive healthcare profile and clear catalyst path.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Undervalued cash-generative biotech with durable HIV franchise and pipeline optionality.
thesis_invalidators: Pipeline setback in key late-stage program
Unexpected pricing pressure in core HIV products

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Mastercard
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Quality compounder with strong cash flow and technical reset near support.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Global payments secular growth plus pricing power should drive durable earnings compounding.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Johnson & Johnson
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Defensive healthcare exposure with oversold RSI improves portfolio balance for moderate profile.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Diversified healthcare cash flows offer downside resilience with modest re-rating upside.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: SPDR Gold Trust
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Materials hedge with stable momentum and macro support from diversified risk posture.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Gold serves as portfolio ballast against macro shock while preserving upside in risk-off episodes.
thesis_invalidators: Real yields rise sharply above trend

risk_adjusted_picks.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Operational leverage to gold prices with higher volatility, suitable as smaller satellite position.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Gold miner beta can outperform bullion in supportive macro, but requires tighter risk controls.

historical_accuracy.notable: Historical baseline reused from previous run; this report prioritizes fresh technical reset signals and updates thesis tracking from today forward.

warnings: Several top picks are technical mean-reversion trades; use staged entries rather than all-in execution.
Earnings/event risk remains elevated in fintech and selected large-caps, so stop-loss discipline is required.
Financials concentration should be monitored to avoid overexposure to one macro factor.
Materials hedge depends on macro uncertainty; trim if real-yield trend rises materially.
If Fear & Greed deteriorates toward extreme fear quickly, preserve liquidity and defer adds.
